ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., CITY OF AGOURA HILLS) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the precinct is situated */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct (e.g., N) */,
  "precinct_address" TEXT /* Address of the precinct (if different from the location) */,
  "precinct_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the precinct */,
  "precinct_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the precinct */,
  "precinct_open_time" TEXT /* Time when the precinct opens for voting */,
  "precinct_close_time" TEXT /* Time when the precinct closes for voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "candidate_contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Website of the candidate */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the voting data was collected */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voting data was collected */,
  "registration" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of voting method (e.g., POLLING PLACE, VBM PORTION) */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "voting_date" TEXT /* Date when the voting data was collected */,
  "voting_time" TEXT /* Time when the voting data was collected */,
  "voting_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the voting method */,
  "voting_status" TEXT /* Status of the voting data (e.g., provisional, confirmed) */,
  "voting_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the voting data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, auditor) */,
  "user_contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the user */,
  "user_contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the election commission */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
